session.task: Build interactive file relationship graph, codebase impact treemap, cross-session analytics, and session diff view to differentiate from basic chat viewer

events.reason: Built complete Insights page with: 1) Force-directed graph using Canvas API — 31 file nodes with 80 co-modification edges, hover reveals connections. 2) Top Projects bar chart ranked by lines impacted. 3) Highest Impact Sessions cards showing blast radius. 4) File Touch Frequency chips color-coded by read/write ratio. Also improved StatsBanner and added workspace filter.
